name: Glorious Christmas Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in the boiling water.
2. Stir in the frozen lemonade.
3. Add the cold water and cranberry juice cocktail to taste.
4. Place two trays of ice cubes in a large punch bowl.
5. Pour the punch over the ice.
6. Top with ginger ale, gently pouring it into the punch bowl.
